trans-unit.source: Argument cannot be null, empty, or whitespace only.
trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null, empty, or whitespace only.

trans-unit.source: Value cannot be null or empty string.
trans-unit.target: Value cannot be null or empty string.

trans-unit.source: Attribute '{0}' is not allowed in element '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Attribute '{0}' is not allowed in element '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The attribute '{0}' has an unallowed value '{1}' in element '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: The attribute '{0}' has an unallowed value '{1}' in element '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: 0 - attribute name 1 - attribute value 2 - element name

trans-unit.source: The item passed to the Update method cannot refer to a different item than the one being updated.
trans-unit.target: The item passed to the Update method cannot refer to a different item than the one being updated.

trans-unit.source: Unable to update setting since it is in a machine-wide NuGet.Config.
trans-unit.target: Unable to update setting since it is in a machine-wide NuGet.Config.

trans-unit.source: Cannot update the node of a setting.
trans-unit.target: Cannot update the node of a setting.

trans-unit.source: Unable to update setting since it is in an uneditable config file.
trans-unit.target: Unable to update setting since it is in an uneditable config file.

trans-unit.source: There are multiple client certificate configurations associated with the same package source(s): {0}
trans-unit.target: There are multiple client certificate configurations associated with the same package source(s): {0}

trans-unit.source: Credentials item must have username and password.
trans-unit.target: Credentials item must have username and password.

trans-unit.source: PackageSourceMapping is enabled and there are multiple package sources associated with the same key(s): {0}. Path: {1}
trans-unit.target: PackageSourceMapping is enabled and there are multiple package sources associated with the same key(s): {0}. Path: {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - package sources separated with comma 1 - path

trans-unit.source: Encryption is not supported on non-Windows platforms.
trans-unit.target: Encryption is not supported on non-Windows platforms.

trans-unit.source: The attribute {0}-{1} is not valid.
trans-unit.target: The attribute {0}-{1} is not valid.

trans-unit.source: Package source '{0}' must have at least one package pattern.
trans-unit.target: Package source '{0}' must have at least one package pattern.

trans-unit.source: Package source '{0}' must have at least one package pattern. Path: '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Package source '{0}' must have at least one package pattern. Path: '{1}'
trans-unit.note: 0 - The name of the item 1 - file path

trans-unit.source: Cannot merge two different sections.
trans-unit.target: Cannot merge two different sections.

trans-unit.source: A credentials item must have only one Password or ClearTextPassword entry.
trans-unit.target: A credentials item must have only one Password or ClearTextPassword entry.

trans-unit.source: A credentials item must have only one Username entry.
trans-unit.target: A credentials item must have only one Username entry.

trans-unit.source: A credentials item must have only one ValidAuthenticationTypes entry.
trans-unit.target: A credentials item must have only one ValidAuthenticationTypes entry.

trans-unit.source: Certificate for the package source '{0}' was not found in '{1}.{2}' storage by '{3}' criteria with '{4}' value.
trans-unit.target: Certificate for the package source '{0}' was not found in '{1}.{2}' storage by '{3}' criteria with '{4}' value.
trans-unit.note: 0 - Package source name 1 - Store location 2 - Store name 3 - Find by 4 - Find value

trans-unit.source: Password and ClearTextPassword cannot be used at the same time.
trans-unit.target: Password and ClearTextPassword cannot be used at the same time.

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configuration password for the package source '{0}' cannot be decrypted
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configuration password for the package source '{0}' cannot be decrypted

trans-unit.source: A fileCert path specified a file that does not exist.
trans-unit.target: A fileCert path specified a file that does not exist.

trans-unit.source: A fileCert item path was not set.
trans-unit.target: A fileCert item path was not set.

trans-unit.source: File '{0}' does not exist.
trans-unit.target: File '{0}' does not exist.

trans-unit.source: "{0}" cannot be called on a NullSettings. This may be caused on account of insufficient permissions to read or write to "%AppData%\NuGet\NuGet.config".
trans-unit.target: "{0}" cannot be called on a NullSettings. This may be caused on account of insufficient permissions to read or write to "%AppData%\NuGet\NuGet.config".

trans-unit.source: The item does not exist in the {0} section.
trans-unit.target: The item does not exist in the {0} section.

trans-unit.source: Missing required attribute '{0}' in element '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Missing required attribute '{0}' in element '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' must contain an absolute path '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' must contain an absolute path '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The {0} item should not have any attributes and it was found with {1}.
trans-unit.target: The {0} item should not have any attributes and it was found with {1}.

trans-unit.source: There is no NuGet.Config that could be used for writing settings. Please create one at the desired location and restart the client.
trans-unit.target: There is no NuGet.Config that could be used for writing settings. Please create one at the desired location and restart the client.

trans-unit.source: Owners item must have at least one owner.
trans-unit.target: Owners item must have at least one owner.

trans-unit.source: Owners item must only have text content and cannot be empty.
trans-unit.target: Owners item must only have text content and cannot be empty.

trans-unit.source: {0} cannot be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: {0} cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: The repository item with name '{0}' and service index '{1}' has more than one owners item in it.
trans-unit.target: The repository item with name '{0}' and service index '{1}' has more than one owners item in it.

trans-unit.source: The section '{0}' does not exist in the settings.
trans-unit.target: The section '{0}' does not exist in the settings.

trans-unit.source: Parameter 'fileName' to Settings must be just a file name and not a path.
trans-unit.target: Parameter 'fileName' to Settings must be just a file name and not a path.

trans-unit.source: Error parsing NuGet.Config. Element '{0}' cannot have descendant elements. Path: '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Error parsing NuGet.Config. Element '{0}' cannot have descendant elements. Path: '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Cannot update package sources, config file contains a duplicated key '{0}' in the disabled package sources section. Path: '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Cannot update package sources, config file contains a duplicated key '{0}' in the disabled package sources section. Path: '{1}'

trans-unit.source: {0}: NuGet.Config has an invalid package source value '{1}'. Reason: {2}
trans-unit.target: {0}: NuGet.Config has an invalid package source value '{1}'. Reason: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 - NU log code 1 - package source value 2 - original exception message

trans-unit.source: NuGet.Config is malformed. Path: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: NuGet.Config is malformed. Path: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: NuGet.Config is not valid XML. Path: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: NuGet.Config is not valid XML. Path: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: NuGet.Config does not contain the expected root element: 'configuration'. Path: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: NuGet.Config does not contain the expected root element: 'configuration'. Path: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Failed to read NuGet.Config due to unauthorized access. Path: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Failed to read NuGet.Config due to unauthorized access. Path: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: File location not known
trans-unit.target: File location not known

trans-unit.source: Text elements should not be empty.
trans-unit.target: Text elements should not be empty.

trans-unit.source: A trusted signer entry must have at least one certificate entry.
trans-unit.target: A trusted signer entry must have at least one certificate entry.

trans-unit.source: Unknown hash algorithm is not supported.
trans-unit.target: Unknown hash algorithm is not supported.

trans-unit.source: Unexpected failure reading NuGet.Config. Path: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Unexpected failure reading NuGet.Config. Path: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Password decryption is not supported on .NET Core for this platform. The following feed uses an encrypted password: '{0}'. You can use a clear text password as a workaround.
trans-unit.target: Password decryption is not supported on .NET Core for this platform. The following feed uses an encrypted password: '{0}'. You can use a clear text password as a workaround.

trans-unit.source: Password encryption is not supported on .NET Core for this platform. The following feed try to use an encrypted password: '{0}'. You can use a clear text password as a workaround.
trans-unit.target: Password encryption is not supported on .NET Core for this platform. The following feed try to use an encrypted password: '{0}'. You can use a clear text password as a workaround.

trans-unit.source: Certificate entry has an unsupported hash algorithm: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Certificate entry has an unsupported hash algorithm: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Unable to parse config file because: {0} Path: '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to parse config file because: {0} Path: '{1}'.
